message:
fix(fr-runtime): FAILOVER rejects in cluster mode before every other check (br-frankenredis-s12v)

Upstream replication.c::failoverCommand checks server.cluster_enabled FIRST and emits
'ERR FAILOVER not allowed in cluster mode. Use CLUSTER FAILOVER command instead.'
before any other validation (replica-role check, ABORT-arg parsing, TIMEOUT/TO/FORCE option parsing).

Our handler only had the replica-role check. Add the cluster-mode pre-check matching upstream
wording + ordering, plus a new test that pins both the wording AND the ordering precedence
(cluster check beats ABORT-arg parsing and the replica-role check).

fr-runtime 281 passed; cargo clippy --tests -D warnings clean; cargo fmt --check clean.

Slice of br-frankenredis-s12v (FAILOVER + replication checkpoint).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
